title: Tracking narrative storms in the AI ecosystem
author: topicspace
selftext:
I’ve been on this journey exploring the dynamics of narratives in media across the ecosystem of AI actors. 

Narratives aren’t straightforward, they can be messy, fragmented, varying across channels. I track their density, acceleration, trajectory, applying the techniques meteorologists use to track storms to understand “should I pay attention to this? Where will this land?”.  Then I overlay price. The result is a leaderboard, helping to surface what’s interesting. 

It’s been fun, but perhaps it’s not worthwhile—it takes time, costs money, so the question is—do you find this useful, is it helping you? I’ll keep the lights on if I’m adding value. 

So, honest feedback, let me know.. https://tooicspace.com
